description_long: This is a single-story house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard and several stylized trees. The house features a flat roof with exposed beams and a mix of open and enclosed spaces, including a covered patio area at the front. The exterior walls are rendered in pastel shades of pink, yellow, and beige, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing access to the garden. The property is bordered by a white picket fence and includes a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The landscaping is simple, with manicured grass and evenly spaced trees providing shade and privacy.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, pastel exterior walls, large windows, and a fenced yard with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, covered patio, and several trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, fenced perimeter, and the arrangement of rooms and windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional patio space, and more trees along the fence line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, garden area, and the continuation of the fence and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered patio, single front door, and adjacent driveway, with minimal decorative elements.
